title: ROTATED UHD Sun&Moon
description: DEFAULT TILTED UHD Sun&Moon, forget about pixelated/jaggy lines
body:
# **ROTATED UHD Sun & Moon 🌞🌙**

**This resourcepack redefines the way you experience the sky in Minecraft. Instead of the traditional pixelated square shapes, the Sun and Moon are upgraded into ultra-HD diamond-shaped celestial bodies. ✨**

_No shaders. No mods. Just pure vanilla Minecraft enhanced with clean, rotated textures that remove jagged edges and give the world a fresh, modern look._

**🌅 Sunrise (Vanilla)**

![Vanilla_Sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/9ed764c1b23d832e3fa16f86ace53174f761a495.png)

_Witness the diamond Sun rising over a completely vanilla world — sharp, bright, and smooth._

**🌌 Nightfall (Vanilla)**

![Vanilla_Nightfall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/12e23dbf7bd8a8e2dc2b515c1147008cf5fed60d.png)

_As the sky darkens, the Moon appears in its UHD diamond form, glowing naturally in the night sky._

**🌍 Modded Scenery + UHD Sun & Moon**

![MC2_Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/63a76c8beaa3be71408d9cd1c992d4bd1252b87f.png)
![MC2_Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/2ebaf6c064b8d6445d5c2198f028f1121d36268c.png)

_Perfectly compatible with modded environments — your worlds stay immersive while the Sun and Moon shine in UHD._


<details>
<summary>Info en español</summary>

**Este resourcepack redefine la forma en que experimentas el cielo en Minecraft. En lugar de las formas cuadradas y pixeladas tradicionales, el Sol y la Luna se actualizan con texturas ultra-HD en forma de diamante/rombo. ✨**

_Sin shaders. Sin mods. Solo Minecraft vanilla mejorado con texturas limpias y rotadas que eliminan los dientes de sierra y le dan al mundo un aspecto fresco y moderno._

**🌅 Amanecer (Vanilla)**

![Vanilla_Sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/9ed764c1b23d832e3fa16f86ace53174f761a495.png)

_Presencia el Sol en forma de diamante elevándose sobre un mundo completamente vanilla — nítido, brillante y suave._

**🌌 Anochecer (Vanilla)**

![Vanilla_Nightfall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/12e23dbf7bd8a8e2dc2b515c1147008cf5fed60d.png)

_A medida que oscurece, la Luna aparece en su forma UHD de diamante, brillando naturalmente en el cielo nocturno._

**🌍 Escenario Modeado + Sol y Luna UHD**

![MC2_Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/63a76c8beaa3be71408d9cd1c992d4bd1252b87f.png)
![MC2_Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKNEqf9q/images/2ebaf6c064b8d6445d5c2198f028f1121d36268c.png)

_Perfectamente compatible con entornos modeados — tus mundos se mantienen inmersivos mientras el Sol y la Luna brillan en UHD._

</details>

Included in the future **_"MINECRAFT 2"_** experience


> -karto
